message:
style(fcp-conformance,fcp-core): apply rustfmt across conformance + core tests

Mechanical reformatting only — no behavioural changes. Brings the test
files in line with rustfmt's current preferred line wrapping for
multi-argument function calls, `assert!` invocations, and `expect`
strings. Most diffs collapse 3-line argument lists onto a single line,
align trailing comments, and re-sort import groups so members are
emitted in canonical kebab-aware order.

Files touched (70 total):

- crates/fcp-conformance/tests/*.rs — 68 conformance test files for the
  admission, authority, capability, credential, decode, descriptor,
  device-fitness, enforcement, event-envelope, host-* (admin, agent,
  batch, budget, cancellation, discovery, doctor, enforcement, health,
  mcp, output, progress, redaction, resilience, ring-buffer, supervisor,
  supply-chain), HRW, lease-coordinator, mesh, message-framing,
  object-id, planner, posture, raptorq, ratelimit, revocation, session,
  streaming, symbol, transport-selector subsystems.
- crates/fcp-core/tests/zone_id_display.rs — long fn name now fits on
  one line; no logic change.
- crates/fcp-core/tests/capability_golden_vectors.rs — import block
  re-sorted; `validate_canonical_id` and `fcp2_claims` now appear in
  rustfmt's canonical position.

This is a pure formatting commit so subsequent functional commits in
this push (kebab/SafeUri helpers, tracing span contract, version-parse
boundaries, SSE buffer overflow policy) do not carry incidental fmt
churn alongside the real change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -98,13 +98,7 @@ fn lifecycle_action_serde_uses_snake_case_for_each_variant() {
 
 #[test]
 fn lifecycle_action_rejects_unknown_or_uppercase() {
-    for bogus in [
-        "\"ENABLE\"",
-        "\"Enable\"",
-        "\"\"",
-        "\"start\"",
-        "\"stop\"",
-    ] {
+    for bogus in ["\"ENABLE\"", "\"Enable\"", "\"\"", "\"start\"", "\"stop\""] {
         assert!(
             serde_json::from_str::<LifecycleAction>(bogus).is_err(),
             "LifecycleAction MUST reject {bogus}"
@@ -204,7 +198,10 @@ fn log_severity_implements_copy() {
 #[test]
 fn host_event_kind_serde_uses_snake_case_for_each_variant() {
     let cases = [
-        (HostEventKind::LifecycleTransition, "\"lifecycle_transition\""),
+        (
+            HostEventKind::LifecycleTransition,
+            "\"lifecycle_transition\"",
+        ),
         (HostEventKind::HealthCheck, "\"health_check\""),
         (HostEventKind::ConfigRevision, "\"config_revision\""),
         (HostEventKind::RolloutDecision, "\"rollout_decision\""),

@@ -37,15 +37,15 @@ const PLAINTEXT: &[u8] = b"FCP raptorq symbol payload - canonical fixture for co
 fn baseline_envelope(algorithm: ZoneKeyAlgorithm) -> SymbolEnvelope {
     SymbolEnvelope::encrypt(
         ObjectId::from_bytes([0x11; 32]),
-        7,                              // esi
-        4,                              // k
+        7, // esi
+        4, // k
         PLAINTEXT,
         ZoneId::work(),
         ZoneKeyId::from_bytes([0x22; 8]),
-        1_000,                          // epoch_id
+        1_000, // epoch_id
         NodeId::new("node-source"),
-        0xDEAD_BEEF_CAFE_F00D,          // sender_instance_id
-        12_345,                         // frame_seq
+        0xDEAD_BEEF_CAFE_F00D, // sender_instance_id
+        12_345,                // frame_seq
         &zone_key(),
         algorithm,
     )
